name: MBI Administradora General De Fondo - MBI Global Fixed Income Fondo De Inversion
summary: MBI Administradora General De Fondo - MBI Global Fixed Income Fondo De Inversion invests in global fixed income instruments. MBI Administradora General De Fondo manages the fund. The fund's objective is to generate income and capital appreciation through investments in a diversified portfolio of fixed income securities from around the world.
